response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior full-stack/web engineer, but the profile misses nearly every hard requirement of this role: no Japanese proficiency (native-level is required), no Linux kernel investigation or modification experience, no L2/L3 networking or switch product background, and no exposure to the listed security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, Captive Portal). C experience is limited to a six-month IDE-tooling role in 2014-2015 and a university thesis, far from the strong C-for-UNIX embedded firmware proficiency required.
strengths: 15+ years of software experience with senior/staff-level roles and demonstrated ownership
Polyglot with some C/C++ and systems exposure (National Instruments, low-latency DLang services, Linux)
Strong engineering culture: TDD, open-source authorship, testing tools, and knowledge sharing
concerns: No Japanese language ability listed; the role requires native-level proficiency
No Linux kernel, embedded firmware, or networking/security domain experience (MACsec, 802.1X, SNMP, switch products)
C programming experience is minimal, dated (2014-2015), and not in a UNIX embedded context

key_factors.factor: No Linux kernel or embedded networking-security experience
Solid general senior engineering track record
